segments.text: Shut down the recovery! And against their spacing, incredible control!
segments.original_text: 上げさせなかったがおおー流しているところに対してさせていた

segments.text: The fair also has amazing range!
segments.original_text: 空中前縦にも広い範囲で

full_text: Shut down the recovery! And against their spacing, incredible control! The fair also has amazing range!
